The programme explores how Margaret shaped the Queen in unexpected ways, from the early years when they were the perfect royal pair, to the 1960s when it was Margaret who stole the show, through the scandals and backlash of the 1970s

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1980, serial killer Peter Sutcliffe - known in the press as the Yorkshire Ripper - murdered 13 women and attacked at least seven more in the north of England. In this programme, psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Sutcliffe and look at events in his childhood and adult life that may have triggered his descent into murder, and also examine how he managed to avoid suspicion despite being interviewed by police numerous times

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The American crime drama returns with the team still reeling from the Department of Defence investigation, with Ziva, McGee and Tony having handed in their badges. Parsons continues his inquiries into Gibbs and his agents, but events take a turn when an explosion kills the Secretary of the US Navy and seriously injures the director of Homeland Security. When attempts are made on the lives of Gibbs and Tony, it appears that all of the NCIS agents are in mortal danger. Starring Mark Harmon and Colin Hanks

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the new Secretary of the Navy, charges Gibbs and the team with finding terrorist group the Brotherhood of Doubt, which was responsible for killing her predecessor. She expects the group's next target to be billionaire Tomas Mendez, who spends his money trying to defeat terrorism, but whose motives may not be entirely altruistic. Meanwhile, Tony flies to Tel Aviv, where new Mossad director Orli Elbaz reveals they have a report of a possible sighting of Ziva at a kibbutz she went to as a child. Crime drama, guest starring Marina Sirtis

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice tackles a period property in Bow, in the heart of London's East End, hoping to attract potential buyers by clearing clutter and creating an elegant dining area. Among other improvements, she ditches a navy blue bathroom suite in favour of one in stylish white to ensure the house will fetch the asking price of £300,000

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Sunshine on Leith (2013)
programme.desc: Two soldiers return home to the Scottish port town after finishing their tour of duty in Afghanistan. While they struggle to adjust to life as civilians, the parents of one of the squaddies prepare to celebrate their 30th anniversary in style. Musical featuring songs by the Proclaimers, starring George MacKay, Kevin Guthrie, Peter Mullan and Jane Horrocks

programme.title: Carry On Constable (1960)
programme.desc: A flu epidemic leaves a police station short of staff, forcing a desperate inspector to send four bungling trainees on the beat. The inept would-be bobbies manage to increase the crime rate even before they have started work, and their long-suffering sergeant faces an uphill battle to whip them into shape. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)
programme.desc: A disgraced bodyguard is hired to protect a hitman about to testify against the tyrannical president of Belarus at the International Criminal Court in exchange for the release of his wife from prison. Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Kiss the Girls (1997)
programme.desc: A forensic psychologist hunts for a serial kidnapper stalking a university campus and responsible for his niece's disappearance. Working out of his jurisdiction, he defies local law enforcement officials to get to the truth - with the aid of one of the criminal's past victims, a headstrong doctor determined to see her former captor brought to justice. Thriller, starring Morgan Freeman, Ashley Judd, Cary Elwes and Tony Goldwyn

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A police forensic psychologist searches for the daughter of a senator, who has been kidnapped from her expensive private school by a media-obsessed teacher, sparking a desperate race to hunt down her psychotic and devilishly intelligent captor before it is too late. Thriller prequel to Kiss the Girls, starring Morgan Freeman, Monica Potter, Michael Wincott, Dylan Baker and Penelope Ann Miller

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Cookery. Join Erik Akervall discovering the seafood of Sweden's west coast.

programme.title: Run for Cover (1955)
programme.desc: An honest gunfighter is released from prison after serving time for a crime he did not commit and soon befriends a young upstart. When the older man is appointed sheriff of a nearby town, he insists that his protege is made deputy - but soon discovers his loyalty is misplaced. Western, directed by Nicholas Ray and starring James Cagney, John Derek, Viveca Lindfors and Jean Hersholt

programme.title: The Violent Men (1955)
programme.desc: A ruthless cattle baron sets out to create his own private empire, no matter what the cost. When he resorts to murder, he makes an enemy of a civil war veteran, while his lust for power drives his wife into the arms of his younger brother. Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: An American naval reserve pilot is called up for service in the Korean War, and must leave his family and civilian job as a lawyer. In command of a corps of naval pilots, he heads a bombing campaign on strategic Communist positions, but later comes to question the morality of the conflict. Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney

programme.title: The Ladykillers (1955)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind and his gang come up with a cunning scheme to steal a fortune, but their plan is threatened by the unsuspecting elderly landlady of the boarding house they are staying in. They decide to dispose of her, which proves easier said than done. Classic Ealing comedy, with Alec Guinness, Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Katie Johnson, Cecil Parker, Danny Green and Jack Warner

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: Fences (2016)
programme.desc: Adaptation of the August Wilson play about a working-class African-American dad trying to raise his family in the 1950s, while coming to terms with the events of his life. Directed by and starring Denzel Washington, with an Oscar-winning Viola Davis

programme.title: 2 Guns (2013)
programme.desc: Two undercover agents - one working for the DEA the other for the Navy - infiltrate a drug cartel, only for the planned sting operation to go disastrously wrong. Both operatives become fugitives and must work together to survive - but both keep their true identity a secret, mistakenly thinking the other is a real criminal. Action adventure, starring Denzel Washington and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
programme.desc: The struggling owner of a run-down gym is forced to take drastic action to prevent an arrogant fitness guru buying the business out from under him - and enlists his customers to form a dodgeball team in the hope of triumphing in the US championships. Sporting comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn and Christine Taylor

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz

programme.title: Run Wild, Run Free (1969)
programme.desc: Withdrawn, mute 10-year-old Philip is ignored by his parents and goes off to explore Dartmoor alone, where he meets a retired colonel who shares his knowledge of Devon's wildlife. Under the older man's nurturing tutelage, the boy begins to tame a wild white colt, but fate proffers a series of setbacks just as real progress is being made. Children's drama, starring John Mills, Mark Lester, Sylvia Syms and Bernard Miles

programme.title: Home Again (2017)
programme.desc: Five months after separating from her husband, Alice Kinney and her daughters relocate from New York to her childhood home in Los Angeles, which belonged to her late father, Oscar-winning film director John Kinney. Eventually things take an unexpected turn when she lets three young guys move in with her. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Michael Sheen and Candice Bergen

programme.title: Been So Long (2018)
programme.desc: A dedicated single mother is charmed by a handsome yet troubled stranger on an unusual night on the town. Drama, starring Michaela Coel, Arinzé Kene and Mya Lewis

programme.title: The Wolverine (2013)
programme.desc: The former member of the X-Men is lured out of hiding and travels to Japan, where a dying businessman offers him the chance to give up his immortality for a normal life. He ends up robbed of his superhuman powers by a mysterious scientist and is forced to protect the tycoon's granddaughter from a secret conspiracy's assassins. Superhero adventure spin-off, starring Hugh Jackman and Tao Okamoto

programme.title: Red 2 (2013)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses reunites his squad of retired operatives for a vital mission. A devastatingly powerful new weapon has been stolen, and it falls to Frank's team to retrieve it - which means facing lethal assassins, terrorists and corrupt government officials out to steal the device. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Helen Mirren and John Malkovich

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Felix plans revenge on his childhood abuser. Sienna and Brody hope to bring their baby home, while Liberty struggles with the strength of her feelings for the newborn

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: Two more American couples temporarily switch spouses, with woman whose husband is obsessed with cleaning swapping with a party-goer whose three-year-old son stays up all night

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, Barry is shocked when an attractive teaching assistant agrees to go out with him. Meanwhile, Adam and Dana worry that they've missed their chance with their new crushes

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With Dave Kim's parents out of town for the weekend, Adam decides to throw a party to impress Brea. Beverly lets fame go to her head after her cookbook is published

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when William Penn institutes a new open lunch policy, but Beverly has other plans. Geoff gets more than he bargained for when he uses Barry's student ID

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife disrupts their plans. Santiago asks Jeffords to write a letter of recommendation for her, while Holt and Diaz enlist Gina's assistance with a difficult interrogation. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt and Peralta contract mumps during an investigation, so the pair elect to be quarantined together in the hope that they can use the time to solve the case. Diaz tries to help Boyle through the mourning process for his dog, and Jeffords is forced to clean up Hitchcock and Scully's mess. Oscar Nunez guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago are excited to go on their first real holiday together, but their perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover that an old adversary is on board. Boyle and Diaz vie for the same apartment, while Gina and Jeffords help Captain Holt to survive a visit from his sister Debbie

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is delighted that Leonard has finally managed to find a girlfriend who meets his high standards, but his over-exuberance looks set to cause problems. Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The award-winning celebrity challenge comes to the Channel 4 network, with Greg Davies as the all-powerful Taskmaster and Alex Horne (the show's creator) as his sidekick, setting all manner of perplexing and downright extraordinary tasks for five contestants from the comedy world - Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. They'll be facing giant bears, disappearing cows and flying eggs as they begin their campaign to win the ultimate prize - Greg's golden head

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: In an edition first shown in November 2018, the sofa critics review The Heist, Strictly Come Dancing, Dynasties, They Shall Not Grow Old, Extreme Everest with Ant Middleton, First Dates, and What Lies Beneath

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the dating show. This time, 30-year-old Stephanie, a self-confessed 'dating disaster', and 28-year-old Bethany, a free-spirited artist from Essex, choose a date from a selection of six naked people

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.desc: Sabrina Spellman has the misfortune of starting at a new school the day after her 16th birthday while her aunts inform her she must learn to control the magical powers newly bestowed on her as a fully-fledged witch. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina decides to teach Libby a lesson for spreading nasty lies about her, while Hilda optimistically prepares to go on a date with Drell _ even though he's stood her up more than 1,000 times in the past. Supernatural sitcom, starring Melissa Joan Hart

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: After her sister is jilted four days before her wedding, Stella offers to take over the ceremony with Ted. But when their former partners turn up, old feelings are stirred. Starring Josh Radnor and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The gang fears Ted is repressing his feelings about getting left at the altar after discovering he has drawn up a map of places he can go without bumping into Stella. However, when the friends then visit a 'safe' restaurant, they are horrified to discover she is there too - and after diving under the table to hide, each of them realises there is something in their lives they are running away from

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya DiMeo has moved her family to a new home and school as she has finally found a class with a full-time aide who can serve as eldest son JJ's voice, as the teenager has cerebral palsy and uses a communication board to converse. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Minnie Driver, John Ross Bowie and Micah Fowler

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya remains conflicted about Kenneth's ability to handle JJ's needs, but JJ is sure he has made the right decision, especially when Kenneth creates a new look for him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard's fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey moves back to town and Barry invites her to the prom, but when she refuses, he plans a prank with Principal Ball's car to get out of going. Erica tells Murray she has made a final decision about her future at college, but he is so furious that he insists she pay her own way for rent and food

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Adam celebrates his 16th birthday, his parents are too distracted by Barry and Lainey's engagement and Erica's band ambitions to acknowledge their youngest son's big day. However, the situation presents an opportunity for Adam to ask Erica to put him on the high school social map. Meanwhile, Beverly thinks she can scare Barry and Lainey straight with the reality of being adults

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Holt find the motivation to help Captain CJ with a big case that is proving problematic. Jeffords imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. Diaz and Boyle take a break from the night shift to visit a foot massage parlour

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peralta's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining-room table causes Sheldon to re-evaluate his life. Meanwhile, Howard is offered the chance to go back to the International Space Station, and Bernadette struggles to decide whether to encourage him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After arguing with Sheldon, Howard tries to make amends by taking him to Nasa's headquarters in Houston. Elsewhere, Penny has second thoughts about quitting her job as a waitress when her car dies, while Amy tries to find Raj a date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Elliot searches frantically for a pregnant teenager who has gone missing, while surly Dr Cox arranges for JD to film the birth of a friend's baby

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: The staff try to finish a shift without losing any patients, while JD finds a new friend - stuck in a scanning machine. Comedy, starring Zach Braff, Sarah Chalke, Donald Faison and John C McGinley

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: The DiMeos go on an impromptu family road trip, but Ray has something in store that angers Maya. Dylan grows anxious after visiting a fortune teller

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: To get on the good side of their health insurance agent and obtain the replacement wheelchair JJ needs, the DiMeos ask Dylan to make a big sacrifice at her athletics meeting

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt's mother seeks support from the precinct when her house is burgled. Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom. Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. Boyle, Jeffords and Gina attempt to resolve a petty conflict between Scully and Hitchcock, while Holt loses Santiago's favourite pen. Guest starring Gina Gershon

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled that he gets to celebrate Christmas now that he is engaged to Lainey. Meanwhile, Murray's brother Marvin makes a promise to Adam with a surprising outcome

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is in her element as she prepares for Barry and Lainey's wedding. Geoff worries about Adam's shortcomings as a wedding videographer, while Barry begins to have second thoughts about the whole thing

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to teach a course at the university, and Howard surprises the gang when he decides to enrol on it. Meanwhile, Amy plays Penny and Bernadette off against each other while the tension brews over Penny's new job. Comedy, guest starring Regina King (Southland), with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny attempt to prove Sheldon wrong when he claims that he and Amy have a superior relationship. Meanwhile, Howard is nervous when Nasa asks him to throw the first pitch at a baseball game honouring National Space Day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy game show with Greg Davies setting Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan, Frank Skinner and Josh Widdicombe challenges including trying to paint the best picture of a horse while riding a horse, melon-eating and bath-emptying. programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina has trouble conjuring up a pair of rollerblades, so Aunt Hilda convinces her there is only one thing left to do - get a job and earn enough money to buy the real thing

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina is determined to prove she can use her magic for good and begins to meddle in other people's lives - but Salem warns her that terrible things can occur as a consequence

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney is relieved that a woman he slept with is not pregnant, and creates a new holiday to celebrate not being a father. However, Lily and Marshall are contemplating having children, and ask Ted and Robin to help them decide what to do

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to persuade his boss to hire Ted to redesign the office building, while an unemployed Robin starts hanging out with 'woo girls', a name the gang members give to single women who shout a lot on nights out. Cobie Smulders and Alyson Hannigan star

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ makes friends with the cool kids and takes part in the time-honoured tradition of pranking their rival school with a little help from Kenneth, but JJ is crestfallen when he can't accompany his friends to the Homecoming bonfire, as the location isn't wheelchair-accessible. This forces Maya to spring into action, which further alienates JJ. Meanwhile, Ray struggles with the constant clutter in the house and Dylan is blindsided when Kenneth casually points out the real reason why she's such an avid runner

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Exploring the city on their own, JJ and Kenneth realise that strangers see them as inspirational. The two push their luck, receiving free food and admission to a baseball game, but things soon fall apart. Meanwhile, as the family can't usually do anything without having to consider wheelchair accessibility, Dylan and Ray convince Maya to take them paintballing while JJ is out - but can Maya allow herself to have fun without JJ?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Penny's belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Lainey's domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks that all her singing dreams are about to come true when she lands a job at the new karaoke bar in town. However, when she is tasked with bringing in more customers, she is forced to ask Beverly for help. Meanwhile, Murray tries to teach Barry and Lainey how to be financially responsible adults. Rick Springfield guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winner's apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon receives a nasty surprise when he visits his mother in Houston, while Raj's murder mystery party causes conflict for the rest of the gang members. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is racked with guilt when he tries to date Lucy and Emily at the same time, Penny has trouble deciding whether to take a role in a film, and Sheldon struggles to choose between two gaming systems. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD's blossoming romance takes second place to his hectic work schedule, while Turk and Carla have relationship problems of their own. Dr Cox tries to give the interns the confidence to face up to Dr Kelso. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD is forced to take sides when his new girlfriend causes friction with Elliot, while Turk is taken aback to discover Dr Cox has more than a passing interest in Carla. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: When Maya is ill, Jimmy is forced to become the mother of the house, and Dylan acts as Kenneth's replacement when he gets sick too. Jimmy does surprisingly well handling Maya's day-to-day duties but tries to keep this from her to avoid hurting her feelings. Meanwhile, JJ protects Dylan from a boy she's interested in, and the family band together to pull an all-nighter to finish Ray's science project

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya tries to give Jimmy a Valentine's Day gift, with the help of his old room-mate - who is also her ex-fiance. Ray is overjoyed to find out he has a secret admirer, and JJ is charged with distributing Valentine's Day sweets at school

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. Jeffords, Boyle and Santiago begin to suspect that Gina is harbouring a secret. Ryan Phillippe, Gina Gershon and Jason Mantzoukas guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit, it's up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. Adam's dread of gym class is amplified when Coach Mellor's brother, Coach Nick, arrives and uses fear as a motivator. Meanwhile, Coach Mellor prepares for the next stage in his career

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realises he's neglected his college applications, while Erica struggles with her career choice

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's girlfriend Emily (Laura Spencer) gives Penny the cold shoulder when she learns about his past. Meanwhile, the guys debate investing in Stuart's comic-book shop and becoming part owners of the business. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to revise for a work assessment during the girls' trip to Las Vegas, and Amy and Bernadette accuse her of spoiling their fun. Meanwhile, the guys try to invent something of scientific importance - but only come up with new ways to procrastinate. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jorgie Porter hosts the second dinner party, arranging a living room block party inspired by 1990s hip hop and RnB, serving up a menu of cordon bleu beans on toast

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks for Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan, Frank Skinner and Josh Widdicombe. They have to identify the contents of a table full of mystery pies, make a film backwards and high five a 55 year old. Alex Horne helps coax the contestants to reveal how comic, creative and seriously competitive they are

programme.title: X-Men: The Last Stand (2006)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes return to face a battle on three fronts. Arch-enemy Magneto is back with an army of followers, while a corporation has created a drug that permanently robs mutants of their powers. Meanwhile, their former ally Jean Grey has returned from the dead as the destructive and seemingly unstoppable Phoenix. Third instalment of the superhero saga, starring Hugh Jackman, Ian McKellen, Famke Janssen, Halle Berry and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy needs something normal in her life, so, much to Giles's horror, she auditions for the school's cheerleading squad. A series of unpleasant accidents disrupts the try-outs, leading to suspicions that a witch is using black magic to eliminate the competition. A girl under pressure from her former cheerleader mother seems the most likely suspect - but the truth is far stranger

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Cordelia believes a scroll predicts Angel's death, but before she can do anything about it she is cursed by a demon hired by the dastardly lawyers at Wolfram & Hart. Meanwhile, Lindsey and his colleagues work on summoning another creature to plague the soulful vampire. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz and Charisma Carpenter

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: After a delay of six months, Rick unfreezes time hoping that everything will return to normal, but warns Morty and Summer not to touch Jerry and Beth in case unstable timelines cause parallel dimensions to develop. However, the youngsters' feelings of uncertainty fracture time and split reality, leaving them lost in oblivion with Rick

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Your Questions to the PM: #BBCAskThis, I'm a Celebrity, The Andrew Marr Show, Dynasties, Mrs Wilson, The Apprentice and A Hotel for the Super Rich & Famous

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Science technician Ian has a date with shy nursery nurse Stacie and glamorous 22-year-old dental nurse Cece is looking for someone who can see that beauty is more than skin deep. Aldine, 42, has been engaged five times without ever making it down the aisle and project manager Paul, 38, is looking for a woman with a bit of spirit, but could Aldine be a bit too much for him to handle?

programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a 1941 Austin 10 utility truck owned by a former soldier who has used it as an all-purpose vehicle on his farm

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw secretly restore a 1992 Mazda RX-7, a Japanese sports car with an unusual rotary engine belonging to a charity worker with a degenerative eye condition

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The meets a pair of newlyweds who instead of a honeymoon spent their money on an old army truck, which they plan to transform into a mobile holiday home, and a master craftsman in Dorset making an eco-friendly luxury treehouse - complete with sauna, spiral staircase and even a slide. In New Zealand, George visits a hilltop beach house overlooking the Pacific, and as ever he and old friend Will Hardie embark on another series-long project - this time to build a gravity-defying, rotating home inspired by vintage sci-fi comics

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dairy farmer's wife and Disney enthusiast Charlene Fry-Henderson hosts the first dinner party in Dumfries and Galloway, where she hopes that her locally reared meat, home cooking, and entertainment involving a plastic cow will secure her the £1,000 prize. Her guests are local radio presenter Tommy Jardine, banker Olive Melville, prison custody officer Tammy Rice and trainee teacher Josh Jones

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Horse enthusiast and banker Olive Melville hosts the second dinner party in Dumfries and Galloway, where she hopes to impress her guests with a crab starter and mousse dessert - but things take a turn for the worse when a conversation about the royal family divides the diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Local radio DJ Tommy Jardine hosts the third dinner party in Dumfries and Galloway, and prepares chicken stuffed with haggis - but first he must continue a family tradition and rustle up a sheep for his entertainment. Tommy then tries to impress his guests with a touch of celebrity name-dropping, but young dance DJ and trainee teacher Josh trumps him at his own game

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher and club DJ Josh Jones hosts the fourth night in Dumfries and Galloway, and hopes he can broaden his fellow contestants' palates with his menu of Indian food. He plans lamb pasanda and tandoori monkfish, but Tammy Rice finds something in her glass that wasn't on the menu. However, Josh hopes his disco entertainment might impress the guests enough to bag him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tammy Rice hosts the final evening in Dumfries and Galloway, hoping to win the £1,000 prize with her no-nonsense approach and traditional Scottish fare. The dinner-party novice rustles up chorizo and cous cous stuffed peppers for her starter and incorporates haggis into her chicken-based main course

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the White Lodge Hotel in Filey, North Yorkshire, where hosts James and Kim Hodgson hope their love of high standards will win over their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Amanda Lucia-Charley and her friend Alan Talbot invite the other hoteliers to sample the delights of Crystals on the Prom in Blackpool, where Alan introduces his alter-ego Ada

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Old Red Lion Country Inn in Upper Poppleton, North Yorkshire, where pair Mark and Jean Lee hope their plain and simple pub B&B will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest ends at glamping site Camp Katur in Kirklington, North Yorkshire, where Kerry Roy and Nicola Wilding hope to wow their guests with their unique 'geodomes' and see-through pods

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the contest arrives, and while Amanda Lucia-Charley and Alan Talbot receive harsh criticism of their breakfast, Mark and Jean Lee's decor receives scathing reviews

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Divorce lawyer Michelle Camacho hosts the first dinner party in south London, where she hopes that her 1970s menu of duck a l'orange and coleslaw, vegetables and a Bloody Mary sorbet for dessert will help to secure her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pub manager and artist Matt Wren hosts the second evening in south London, but his dinner party is beset by disasters in the kitchen and arguing guests at the dinner table when Michelle and Licia have a spat. However, one of the five takes a liking to another of the contestants

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Licia Snow hosts the third party in south London, and hopes to impress her guests with rustic and homely touches during her laid-back evening. However, her relaxed and calm approach could be threatened when she clashes with Michelle at the dinner table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raphael Steele hosts the fourth night in south London and hopes that his first-ever dinner party will be a success. He plans a Caribbean evening based on old family recipes featuring ackee, saltfish and curried goat, and organises steel drum music for entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Swedish businesswoman Charlotte Sundberg hosts the final party in south London. Her tactics are to present a night full of schnapps, folk songs and classic cuisine from her Scandinavian homeland, which she hopes will help her scoop the cash prize

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the oncoming seasonal changes. The team awaits the arrival of some new, and unpredictable, animals which could prove a handful for Jimmy and the rangers. Meanwhile, wildlife in the woodland starts to harvest the summer's bounty to get ready for winter

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lake District, walker Philip calls on the Patterdale Mountain Rescue Team when a hike in the hills ends in a nasty break. Newquay Search and Rescue team prepare for a special visitor at base. And coastguard rescue teams work together to help Chrissy, who is seriously injured on a cliff near Cape Cornwall

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors carry out tests on 77-year-old Martin, who was rushed to St George's after collapsing at home and suffered two further seizures in A&E. As he waits to find out what is causing him problems, his wife Margaret talks about their life together. Meanwhile, 83-year-old widower Harry arrives with shortness of breath, chest pains and dizziness after collapsing while shopping. Paediatric nurse Kelly, who loves working with children, treats six-year-old Lilly, who has cut her head after falling off her scooter

programme.title: Inside James's
programme.desc: A woman with breast cancer undergoes surgery and Dr Cliona Ni Cheallaigh discusses her work running a clinic for patients suffering from HIV and Hepatitis C

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea

Newquay Search and Rescue team prepare for a special visitor at base. And coastguard rescue teams work together to help Chrissy, who is seriously injured on a cliff near Cape Cornwall

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is taught how to bind books by expert Isabelle Ting, and reveals how to create a notebook from leftover materials including leather offcuts, recycled leather coats and decorative paper

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman shows Joanne and Dean from Hertfordshire five properties in Tenerife, but it remains to be seen which, if any, they will buy for their £150,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit an East Midlands reclamation yard, where they find a Russian motorbike and sidecar dating back to the Second World War and a 1970s fire surround

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien turns car seats into a three-piece suite during a trip to Leyland, while Henry Cole repurposes an overhead light into a fashionable light box

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel redesigns the rooms in one of the chateau's turrets with a fruits and flowers motif - but an unexpected surprise lurks behind her creations. Outside, Dick is putting together a parkour fitness trail in the 12 acres of grounds, but hits upon an unexpected obstacle buried deep underground

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Pembrokeshire to help Graham and Dorothy build an upside-down eco-house by the sea. Although they are not fans of DIY and have no self-build experience, the couple plan to complete their new home in just 20 weeks, but they are left wondering if they have taken on too much

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of 'glamping' at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Pedro the giant anteater is about to be reunited with long-term mate Bliss, but falls ill and faces a major operation, with an uncertain outcome. Chester Zoo's extremely rare bald ibises produce a batch of new chicks, which are destined to be released back into the wild in southern Spain. There is also a chance to witness the reunion of rhino couple Beni and Asha, who have been kept separate for four years

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The temperatures soar as Dick and Angel face the busiest period of the year, as the school holidays coincide with peak wedding season. Dick comes up with an ingenious solution to stop wedding cakes from melting in the heat, but it involves piercing the chateau's walls. The moat is transformed into a boating lake, giving visitors a chance to cool down, and the family takes to the water in a home-made punt

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets resourceful and intrepid self-builders as they transform their dream designs into practical living space. Here, Brendan Moran and wife Penny face a challenging build in the beach side suburb of North Bondi, Sydney, with no guarantee of how or when their multi-tiered house will ever be completed

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of architect Richard Hawkes and his wife Sophie, as they move from London to the Kent countryside to build a hi-tech eco-friendly house with room to grow their own food. Richard also wants their new home to blend effortlessly into the surrounding countryside, concealed beneath a huge arch of clay tiles covered with earth and planted with grass

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: Peter Monk and his team's aircraft are due to play a starring role in the Biggin Hill air show, but before the big occasion they need to get their Spitfire back to the paint shop

programme.title: Guy Martin: Last Flight of the Vulcan Bomber
programme.desc: The mechanic joins a select crew of engineers working to prepare the last Vulcan bomber that is capable of flight for a farewell tour of the UK. The programme features contributions from former crew members, who recall its service in conflicts from the 1950s to the Falklands, as well as serving as Britain's nuclear deterrent

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Thirty-seven-year-old Robert arrives at St George's Hospital, London after colliding with a car on his motorbike. Scans show he has a bleed on the brain, a broken jaw, and two missing teeth, and he faces potentially life-changing injuries and extensive surgery. Meanwhile, 54-year-old Mary collapsed in the street on the way to work and hit her head. Doctors need to establish whether it is simple fainting, or whether something more sinister is to blame, with tests revealing she will need a pacemaker fitted. Plus, 27-year-old Jessica comes to A&E with a wound that will not heal, after having a lumpectomy to remove breast cancer tissue two months ago

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Bill Bailey taking on special guest captain Joe Wilkinson and Isy Suttie. Susie Dent is joined by Joe Lycett in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

While midwife Liz likes traditional houses, accountant Craig favours contemporary styles, and when the build veers towards the modern, Liz struggles to stay engaged. However, Charlie is worried that the pair are making some big mistakes when it comes to the building's eco-features

programme.desc: The competition begins at stately home Anstey Hall in Cambridge, with father and son team John and Johnny de Bruyne. The fun starts with a character-revealing afternoon of goose-herding, before the participants dress to impress at a formal dinner. John recounts stories of royal connections - which fails to impress hotel managers Mark and Layla. In the morning, as they tuck in to a self-service breakfast, guest Tim decides that DIY doesn't work at Anstey Hall, but when he notes this on his feedback form, John and Johnny accuse him of game-playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs hopes to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism. Judging with an extra critical eye are John and Jonny De Bruyne, who received negative feedback from Tim, and a thorough room inspection reveals a dusty porn DVD. Tim tries to encourage his nervous guests to take part in a naked spa experience, but John opts to watch television instead. When feedback is invited, Tim is delighted to discover Mark and Layla would stay again but shocked by the 'porn film' discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire for the third day of the competition, where a treasure hunt organised by hosts Mark and Layla brings out their guests' competitive sides. Meanwhile, there is confusion at breakfast and Layla's manners are criticised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, where owners Paul and Lynnie Jolly set out to spoil their guests. Everyone is overwhelmed by the added extras, but naturist Tim is put off by cushions and clutter. After a masterclass in Nordic walking, Lynnie serves up a veg smoothie, which unhealthy eaters Mark and Layla dubiously down in one. Over dinner, Tim challenges his host's organic 'niche'. And Layla, still smarting from his negative feedback, labels him 'weird, naked Tim'. At breakfast, guests are wary as Tim's order goes wrong and Jonny and Layla engage in an eating competition. When feedback is invited, the Jollys are affronted by accusations of special treatment and vow to put the record straight

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition, the owners of Anstey Hall, the Clover Spa and Hotel, the Angel Hotel and Higher Gitcombe meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Having aired their issues, the winners are announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: At Chester Zoo, Rothschild giraffe Tula is a week overdue after a 13-month pregnancy. But keepers are anxious that history could repeat itself - she gave birth to a stillborn calf last year. Cameras also follow this year's brood of penguin chicks. They are about to face the ordeal of joining the main pool, where they must compete for fish with the adult penguins. And baby silvery gibbon Eko learns how to swing between ropes - 50 feet up

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The wedding season draws to close, but Dick and Angel need to look ahead to the winter. Dick ploughs up the wild flower meadow, a change that Angel does not entirely approve of, and the couple transforms the dilapidated coach house into a cafe, complete with a striking neon sign

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Couple Phil Davidson and Ariana Evans give themselves just two weeks to construct their new home in beachside Maianbar, south of Sydney, despite the fact that they have never built anything before. They're utilising a building system that has never been employed for domestic housing in Australia, and could turn out to be either a new blueprint for swift construction or a disaster

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Brighton couple Daren Howarth and Adi Nortje, who want to build an earth-sheltered home from recycled materials, based on ideas pioneered in New Mexico in the 1970s. However, land prices and planning laws have forced the pair out of England and into Brittany. To keep costs down, Daren and Adi enlist the help of unskilled volunteers to work on the house, in exchange for teaching them the construction techniques

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: Shut-Ins: Britain's Fattest People
programme.desc: Documentary following the struggle of three severely morbidly obese people as they attempt to regain control of their lives before it is too late. Claire has been bed-bound for the last six years. Trapped by her 40-stone body, she can only see the world through the window of the room where she spends her life. Claire has two daughters - Tracey and Jasmine - who need to do nearly everything for her. Tracey has two young children and a home of her own, so the burden of care falls mainly on 19-year-old Jasmine. The programme tracks the family's journey as local surgeon Nick Carter battles to get Clare the help she needs

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with Sean Lock and Henning Wehn taking on guest captain Bill Bailey and Jessica Hynes. Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Staffordshire bull terrier requires attention when it suffers complete paralysis in its back legs, and a Devon rex cat is brought in after being struck by a car. Its eight-year-old owner faces a tough decision when X-rays reveal a severely broken pelvis and a ruptured bladder. Plus, a young cavalier king has had seven operations in a bid to fix its knee joint, and Noel tries to resolve the problem

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are expensive, while Jimmy Doherty investigates why so many cockles in UK supermarkets come from abroad when he always thought of them as a quintessentially British staple. Kate Quilton takes a trip around Europe's largest marshmallow factory to find out why the sticky treat goes crispy and melty at the same time over the campfire

programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon to a big welcome from both their families. However, Smithy seems disconcerted by his pal's return and Nessa makes a confession that spoils the happy occasion. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne, James Corden and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Smithy goes missing following Nessa's shocking revelation, and the boys try to track him down to persuade him to accept his responsibilities. Meanwhile, Stacey is forced to contemplate the consequences of transforming her long-distance relationship with Gavin into a functioning marriage

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Smithy accompanies Nessa to the hospital for her first ultrasound scan, and the pair catch a glimpse of their baby. Stacey becomes unusually excited at the prospect of a weekend visit to her family home after she struggles to adjust to her role as an 'Essex wife' - which proves to lack some of the glamour she had expected

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Hapless uncle Bryn organises a special treat for Gwen's birthday. However, his supposedly covert actions do not go as unnoticed as he would like, and an unexpected guest arrives. Meanwhile, Stacey tries to summon the courage to tell Gavin of her big decision

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: The newlyweds begin leading separate lives back in their home towns. In Essex, Smithy makes efforts to remind Gavin of the excitement of his bachelor years with a traditional boys' night out. Meanwhile in Barry, Stacey tries to distract herself with a trip to the bingo

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Nessa goes into labour a month early in Barry, and the newlyweds must forget their differences to track down Smithy in time for the birth of his child. Meanwhile, Stacey returns to Essex to salvage her marriage

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert and Greg Davies negotiate a variety of unusual hazards as they travel through Nepal, a country with one of the world's highest rates of road traffic accidents. programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Noel Fielding for a quickfire 48-hour break in Danish capital Copenhagen, where they join a cycle tour of the city, sample some stunning sandwiches and visit an underground art gallery. They also find the time for a trip to the Tivoli Gardens and taste Danish pastries and beer at the Carlsberg Brewery

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Greg Davies for two days in Moscow. The pair's first port of call in the Russian capital is Red Square, where their appreciation of the Kremlin, St Basil's and Lenin's tomb is rudely interrupted as the tanks roll by at rehearsals for a military parade. They also visit the Cosmonaut Museum and try genuine space food, followed by a visit to one of the strangest circuses in the world

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team sets off on a high-altitude trek from Kathmandu, capital of Nepal, to the Forbidden City of Lo Manthang, a secretive kingdom perched high on the Tibetan plateau, on the far side of the Himalayas. On a five-day expedition through the highest mountains, deepest gorges and harshest terrain on the planet, Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris battle huge river crossings, vast mudslides and dizzying mountain passes on a trip that would test even the hardiest new 4x4s to the limit. But Paddy, Freddie and Chris aren't crossing the Himalayas in new 4x4s. They're crossing the Himalayas in a small old Peugeot, a very compact old Renault, and Nepal's first (and only) home-built car

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: How the Nazis searched for religious items. However, after their defeat, an American detachment known as ‘The Monuments Men' found and repatriated a large proportion of the loot

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases

programme.title: Impossible Engineering

programme.title: Impossible Engineering

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough encounters two species with wrinkly skin, where nature has tinkered with the ageing process to different effect. The mole rat retains its looks while growing old and the elephant looks old from birth, yet both creatures live relatively long lives

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actor and stage director Derek Jacobi enjoyed a relatively humble upbringing in Leytonstone, London, where his father ran a sweet shop and his mother worked in a drapery, but research into his maternal side of the family soon uncovers a link to a far more intriguing past. Discovering that his great-grandmother's name was Salome Laplain, Jacobi finds that he is descended from a wealthy French Huguenot who fled religious persecution, and who has connections to royalty on this side of the channel

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Jerry Hall sets out to discover how her father's family, who she knew were originally from Oldham, ended up in the United States, and her investigation takes her from the cotton mills of Lancashire to the plains of Texas at the time of the railroad. She also explores her mother's side of the family and discovers her ancestors' pioneering roots as they headed west across the United States at the time of the Frontier, and finds out about a connection to the original pioneer and American folk hero, Daniel Boone

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates the theory that Nazis were engaged in building spacecraft before the outbreak of the Second World War

programme.title: Adolf Hitler's War

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An abandoned railway station near a town in Spain that is home to just 500 people and a record-breaking Arctic facility that goes deep underground

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo's journey from the Irish Sea to the North Sea continues by tram from Manchester. At the imposing town hall of the world's first industrial city, he comes face to face with the Victorian scientist who invented modern atomic theory. The latest stage ends at Silkstone Common, where he tracks down the forge where a Victorian metallurgist created wrought iron axles strong enough for railway rolling stock

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael starts his journey in Chapeltown, Sheffield, following what was once known as the North Country Continental service, and finishing in the engineering centre of Doncaster

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an episode from RAF Coningsby, an operational air base in Lincolnshire, where she takes to the sky in a Dakota aircraft and examines some air force memorabilia including a teddy bear that was on board one of the Dambuster planes and designs for the Vulcan bomber. Items brought in to be valued include a painting by John Singer Sergeant, a crystal decanter and an officer's coat from the American Civil War

programme.title: Restoration Workshop
programme.desc: Antiques dealer and expert restorer Gary Wallis and his team of highly skilled craftspeople turn the tired and unloved items into objects that will turn a large profit. They have £180,000 budget to transform the entire house, so George enlists award-winning architect Greg Blee. However, while the owners buy into his modernist scheme the local planners do not. programme.desc: Charlie is taken aback to learn his former girlfriend Lisa is getting married and resolves to prove he is a better family man than her fiance by organising a Thanksgiving get-together. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen, Holland Taylor and Angus T Jones. Guest starring Denise Richards

programme.desc: Alan is devastated to learn Judith has found a new boyfriend, and begins to wallow in gloom. To help boost his confidence, Charlie and Jake try to give him a makeover, but eventually admit defeat and bring in a gay man to choose the perfect outfit

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Part one of two. Charlie falls for crazy woman Frankie (guest star Jenna Elfman) whom he sees smashing up a car. Despite a worried Alan's protests, Frankie comes home with the pair - leading to a battle for her affections between the brothers

programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After taking pity on a single mother, landlord Ronnie discovered mystery occupants have turned his property into a scrap metal merchants. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
