programme.desc: Part one of two. Karen takes over the plans for Grace's green-card wedding to James, but the bride worries the event is becoming too lavish - especially once she learns singers Hall and Oates will be performing at the ceremony. American sitcom, guest starring Taye Diggs

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part two of two. Grace decides to let Leo know she is pregnant with his child, but receives unexpected news before she has the chance to tell him. Meanwhile, Will settles in with James. Starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Claire is delighted to learn Junior altered an algebra report to make Janet and Michael think he achieved an A instead of an F, and immediately sets out to blackmail him. Comedy, starring Damon Wayans

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Junior's family rallies round to help him deal with a school bully, but only succeed in making matters worse. Meanwhile, baby Kady develops a strange new habit

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A man has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired secretary has to visit her tenant in prison to retake possession of her buy-to-let flat. A Manchester mother applies to the housing charity Shelter for help because she is convinced the property she is renting is making her children ill

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner get caught up in a dispute between a landlord and a tenant who refuses to move out, and Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin chase a £17,000 debt. In Essex, a couple owe their neighbour £11,000, and on the south coast, debt collection from a Turkish restaurant gets complicated when there is confusion about ownership

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul Bohill and Phil Short must deal with a negligent tenant who fled upon their arrival, forcing the agents to set a trap in order to evict him. Brian O'Shaughnessy and Kevin Stokes chase a debt of £5,000 in Kent, before heading to Surrey to recover £11,000 owed by the owner a bespoke furniture business. Plus, Paul and Steve Pinner's patience is tested to the limit when they are sent to carry out an eviction in London

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police dog unit is called into action to chase a thief seen trying to break into a lorry, and the pursuit of a Range Rover leads the interceptors to a haul of stolen prestige cars. A seized Lamborghini brings out the team's competitive streak, and the presence of an intruder puts the station on full alert

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The officers in Essex are called on to take drastic action when a pursuit from London arrives in their area. A car thief is forced to face the consequences of his actions, and a drug search in Basildon yields curious discoveries

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Rose makes a lavish dinner for Toadie, and while drunk, Aaron reveals to Nicolette that Chloe misses her

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: The romantic getaway planned by Colby and Taylor turns into shambles as Angelo returns to town. Amber rejects Dean's rebound advances, and Tori does something unexpected

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: A father-of-three who is £30,000 in debt has to decide whether to accept a job offer that could help him clear his debts, or whether he would be better off staying on benefits. A debt-laden aspiring rapper hopes that a chance meeting with a music manager will be his ticket to fame and fortune. A single mother who had her benefits slashed for not declaring her nightclub singer income faces eviction if she doesn't pay her rent arrears

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Welsh couple Ben and Kate hope to achieve their dream of running a bar in the sun. They have just £30,000 to fund their entire move and are checking out five bars to rent. But will any of them fit the bill? Jo and Jan hold an auction to raise funds for their dog rescue shelter, and car salesman Duncan comes up with a radical plan to help his Costa del Sol dealership stay afloat

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan come to the aid of Natasha, a working mum whose Upminster house has become too much for her to handle

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Security guards in West Orchards shopping centre in Coventry try to tackle the issue of serial shoplifters, who are behind around 70% of all the thefts in the centre. Meanwhile at Weston Favell Shopping Centre in Northampton, the security team have their eye on a duo suspected of repeatedly shoplifting using young children as decoys

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: In the Irish town of Thurles, the council want Barry to move into new housing purpose-built for travellers. But they will not allow him to take his 30 horses. Teenager Scarlett, who lives with her traveller family in Luton, dreams of being a successful model - and non-traveller model Danielle Mason is going to help show her the way

programme.title: Harlan Coben's Safe
programme.desc: Tom receives a disturbing phone call right after his trip to ‘Heaven'. An unknown voice offers information in exchange for money, and the desperate father obliges

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Dasha from Worcestershire, who is accustomed to the finest things in life, joins Kate Harris and five of her eight kids on a basic camping trip to west Wales

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: Cookie and Lucious prepare Treasure for her big break, and a tech entrepreneur takes over as CEO of Empire Records, with some surprising new ideas for the company

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen encourages Jack to keep an eye out for another job, while Grace has dinner with Will at his parents' home, and receives a surprise gift from his father for her unborn child - a cherished baby blanket that is practically a family heirloom. American sitcom, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet urges Michael to stop watching so much TV and spend a little more time with the family, but he is glued to a basketball game and does not pay any attention. Later the roles are reversed, making them realise they have a communication problem

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael fears his relationship with Janet has lost its spark when his brother arrives with a beautiful new girlfriend. Meanwhile, Claire tries to win a dance contest - but her routine does little to impress her father

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Property developer Alex calls in an eviction specialist after finding that he could be arrested if he tries to oust squatters from the derelict pub he has recently purchased. Peterborough Council receives a complaint from a family threatened with an illegal eviction and violence by a letting agent. A woman regrets letting her flat to a mother and daughter after trouble with late rent payments turned into a nightmare

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After a four-year nightmare with the tenants of a cottage in north Wales, landlady Rachel gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property. Elsewhere, the Peterborough Council gets a tip-off which leads them to find a property with life-threatening electrics and damp, that could potentially be an overcrowded slum

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart McCracken and Elmore Victor head to Liverpool for what they expect to be a routine repossession, but instead face the most challenging eviction of their careers. Behind the front door, they find a critically ill two-year-old child with major heart problems, who is on constant life support and unable to breathe without a ventilator. Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Plus, Stewart and Elmore encounter another family in crisis in Birmingham, where a retired couple who acted as guarantor for their daughter's tenancy are liable to pay over £3,000 after she defaulted

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Memorable moments from the series, including the pursuit of two knife-wielding robbers endangering both themselves and the public in a stolen Toyota. The officers also use a mixture of technology and old-fashioned legwork to chase a drug dealer whose number plate flashes up a warning

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Members of Essex's high-speed police interception unit chase a lorry driver across three counties. programme.title: Deep Blue Sea (1999)

Thriller, starring Saffron Burrows, Thomas Jane, Stellan Skarsgard, LL Cool J and Samuel L Jackson

programme.desc: A dentist with gambling debts discovers his wife is having an affair with one of his patients and wants a divorce. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, James Read, Paul Burke, Jo Anderson and Nancy Walker

programme.title: Columbo Cries Wolf (1990)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth suspects the owner of a men's magazine is behind the strange disappearance of his business partner and former lover. The suspect insists the woman is still alive, while the detective struggles to prove his guilt owing to the absence of a body. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ian Buchanan, Rebecca Staab, Deidre Hall and Alan Scarfe

programme.title: Columbo: Etude in Black (1972)
programme.desc: An orchestra conductor murders his mistress for threatening to reveal their affair, and makes her death look like suicide. However, he reckons without the intervention of crumpled cop Columbo, who sees through the subterfuge and determines to get to the truth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, John Cassavetes, Myrna Loy and Blythe Danner

programme.title: Columbo: Identity Crisis (1975)
programme.desc: A CIA operative arranges a grisly fate for a fellow spy who found out that he was working as a double agent. The killer makes the murder look like a random mugging, but he is not as clever as he thinks and the crumpled cop soon begins to pick up on the trail of clues he has left behind. Crime drama, directed by and starring Patrick McGoohan, with Peter Falk and Leslie Nielsen

programme.title: Columbo: Forgotten Lady (1975)
programme.desc: An agelong actress grows desperate to recapture her glory days and resorts to murdering her husband and making it look like suicide. She hopes the publicity will revive her flagging Broadway career, but she reckons without Columbo's uncanny ability to see through her devious performance. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Janet Leigh, Sam Safe and John Payne

programme.title: Columbo: Last Salute to the Commodore (1976)
programme.desc: The owner of a shipbuilding business disapproves of his son's plans for the company, and announces his intention to sell up. However, that night, he is murdered and his body dumped at sea. The crumpled cop, joined by two sidekicks, becomes convinced the victim's son is responsible - but everything is not as it seems. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Vaughn, directed by Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A magazine publisher is killed by a car bomb after he demands to meet a disabled girl he has been supporting. Goren and Eames begin to suspect the girl in question does not even exist and that her foster parents are running an elaborate fraud. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: In an effort to protect her job, Rollins makes a deal with the managers of a gambling club - a move that stirs up suspicion among her colleagues. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish, Mariska Hargitay, Danny Pino and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Newspaper columnist Jimmy MacArthur is given full access to the squad for an inside look at the New York Police Department. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Danny Pino and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sarah Walsh wakes up from a night of partying believing she has been raped for a second time and calls Detective Benson, who handled her previous case. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Barba's loyalties are tested when two of his childhood friends, New York mayoral candidate Alex Munez and his bodyguard Eddie, are involved in a high-profile sex scandal

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Chloe are attacked by an unseen shooter when they respond to a routine 911 call. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hidden anti-Semitic message in a high-school yearbook offers an insight into the murder of an art teacher, and the subsequent case leads McCoy into conflict with 'Klan lawyer' Roy Payne

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis uncover new evidence as they investigate a 30-year-old rape and stabbing case, but the victim is consumed with fear when confronted with the possibility of another trial for the perpetrator

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gas attack occurs at a subway station, and investigations reveal it bears the hallmarks of a previous incident at a church. Briscoe and Curtis are joined by Baltimore detectives Bayliss and Pembleton, who hope to apprehend the prime suspect in both incidents

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A deep-sea diver is murdered on the job, and his co-workers all become suspects. However, when they return to the surface, they must remain in a high-tech decompression chamber for four days. With each of their suspects confined within a tank, the NCIS team must complete an unorthodox investigation from the outside. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the Secretary of the Navy, learns her daughter has been kidnapped, and the NCIS crew teams up with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring the abducted girl home. Meanwhile, McGee's childhood friend, NCIS Special Agent Valerie Page, arrives in town to assist with advanced tactics training. Naval crime drama, guest starring Leslie Hope and Christina Chang

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After the body of a navy lieutenant is discovered aboard a destroyer during a 'tiger cruise', a time when civilian guests are allowed to spend the night on the ship, Gibbs, Quinn and Palmer travel out to sea to investigate. Meanwhile, McGee contemplates the perfect proposal for Delilah Fielding

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a missing MI6 Officer is linked to a murdered petty officer, Gibbs sends Quinn and Bishop to Philadelphia to work with MI6 Officer Clayton Reeves. Meanwhile, Quinn painfully recounts the NCIS case that made her leave field work

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is kidnapped, but manages to escape her captor. The NCIS team members investigate and soon discover a possible connection to her missing husband. Meanwhile, Abby knits both Quinn and Torres personalised 'gifts'

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson crosses paths with Alexandra Cabot while searching for an abducted mother and daughter. Stone is forced to make a tough decision on behalf of his sister

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson is assigned round-the-clock security when sadistic killer William Lewis makes contact with her after escaping from his hospital prison guard. After murdering his doctor, he abducts and threatens to kill the woman's daughter unless Benson admits she lied during his trial - a confession that leads her to an abandoned granary, where the killer indulges in a devastating game of Russian roulette. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Pablo Schreiber

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A student accuses the star of a reality singing competition of molesting her. Rollins believes the man's case should be handled delicately to avoid damaging his career, but Benson disagrees. As more victims come forward, the suspect is adamant he did not commit the crimes, so the team must devise a new strategy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Junior officer Amelia Albers is arrested for a drink-driving, but her ripped clothes and other injuries cause the police concern and they call in Benson for advice. A group of soldiers from her unit is suspected of her rape, but the young woman does not want to cooperate with the SVU out of fear that it may ruin her military career

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: The team investigates the apparent suicide of an American citizen in Colombia, whose demise raises concern when it becomes clear he emptied his bank account prior to his death

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: Jack Garrett and the IRT travel to South Korea to investigate a case in which a US college student is murderered and disfigured, and left in an alley for the authorities to find

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a social worker, exposing a racket involving foster children. The resulting trial sees Paul Robinette place the system in the dock as he defends a black woman accused of kidnapping her baby from his adoptive parents. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman murdered while out jogging is found to be the spouse of a comedy club owner previously acquitted of killing his first wife. In order to secure a conviction, the team is forced to trace the part of a Colombian coin used in a subway. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck ad executive becomes a murder suspect when his wife and son are killed during a night he claims to have spent drinking. Ellen Pompeo (Grey's Anatomy) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to identify the charred remains of a woman caught in an apartment block fire, which was started deliberately. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn battle the lawyers over the fatal shooting of an uninvited nightclub guest who was seen confronting popular rap star Darry 'G-Trane' moments before the murder. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a publishing executive last seen engaged in a heated argument over a taxi. They learn that the killing may have been a race hate crime, with their main suspect having a long history of prejudice. However, a technicality arises in the case, threatening to deny them the conviction. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team looks into a raid on a naval base, and Dr Cyril Taft - the surgeon who saved Gibbs' life - experiences the thrill of assisting on an investigation. Assigned to treat Gibbs' suspect, Taft manages to uncover evidence that may prove crucial to solving the case. Meanwhile, DiNozzo pays his old flame Jeanne Benoit a visit as he chases a lead involving doctors in Sudan. Guest starring John Cryer and Scottie Thompson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An American couple are attacked in Iraq, in the very same spot a group of US Special Ops snipers were ambushed six months earlier. Determined to get to the bottom of the case, Gibbs is forced to speak to Aaron Davis, the only survivor of the first assault, who is now struggling through PTSD at the Walter Reed Medical Centre. The 300th episode of the military crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres boldly breaks protocol when he learns a witness in an NCIS case is wanted by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Meanwhile, Bishop and McGee hope to sublet Tony's apartment - by wooing his father, landlord Tony DiNozzo Sr. Robert Wagner guest stars

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: In March 2010, pub landlord Michael Tucker shot his partner Rebecca Thorpe in the head while she was having a bath and hid her body in a chest freezer in one of the outbuildings of his bar in Snettisham, Norfolk. programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: First episode of the drama about a military bomb disposal team working in London during the blitz. New recruit Brian Ash is thrown in at the deep end. Starring Anthony Andrews

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash employs some new technology that does not work. A new recruit gets some training, and a magazine article causes tension amid the team's superior officers

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash and Machin must dispose of a bomb in a school - only to find another device close by, forcing them to split up and defuse one each

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A sceptical Ash is ordered to deliver a defused but otherwise intact bomb to Dr Gillespie

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A bomb is found in a nightclub which German scientists claim cannot be disarmed, and Ash receives a mysterious message. Guest starring Judy Geeson (the original 1970s Poldark)

programme.title: Mystery on Bird Island (1954)
programme.desc: Five youngsters living in the Channel Islands discover a plot to smuggle valuable birds' eggs out of the country. Children's adventure, starring Mavis Sage and Jennifer Beach

programme.title: Doctor in the House (1954)
programme.desc: A medical student is taken under the wing of three roguish colleagues who lead him astray into a series of pranks and amorous escapades that succeed in infuriating the dictatorial chief surgeon. Comedy based on the novel by Richard Gordon, starring Dirk Bogarde, Kenneth More, James Robertson Justice and Donald Sinden

programme.title: The Captain's Table (1959)
programme.desc: A gruff cargo skipper is given the command of a luxurious liner, but finds it difficult to mind his manners among the upper-class passengers. Comedy, with John Gregson, Donald Sinden, Peggy Cummins and Reginald Beckwith

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White treks along the Isle of Man's stunning coast and visits Sprotbrough in South Yorkshire

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: Opening Up the Soane
programme.desc: Documentary about the extensive refurbishment of Sir John Soane's Museum to restore the building to its original glory

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the contrasting stories of people responding to the traumas of the Second World War. While Kent student Daphne Baker set her heart on becoming a head teacher as her contribution to the war effort, conman Neville Heath embarked on a fraudulent spree preying on vulnerable women

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Princess Anne discusses preparations for the Queen's Birthday Parade, as the Knightsbridge Barracks undergo last-minute rehearsals. Meanwhile, the trainees in the riding school come under pressure as classes intensify, and their instructor struggles to ensure all candidates make the grade

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon spreads her wings and takes full advantage of her sister's hospitality, but Tracey is having money worries. Ross Kemp guest stars, with Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: A Jubilee Tribute to the Queen by the Prince of Wales
programme.desc: Prince Charles pays a personal tribute to Her Majesty to mark her 60-year reign. He reflects on various public events and private family moments over the past six decades and shows previously unseen photographs and home movies - some of which were shot by the Queen herself

programme.title: What's Cooking? (2000)
programme.desc: The members of four diverse families meet up in their respective homes to celebrate Thanksgiving, where the growing Americanisation of the younger generation becomes ever more apparent to their parents, and tangled emotional battles are played out. Drama exploring multiculturalism in Los Angeles, starring Dennis Haysbert, Joan Chen, Julianna Margulies and Kyra Sedgewick

programme.title: Love Is the Devil (1998)
programme.desc: The story of George Dyer, a petty criminal who became the model and lover of leading Dublin-born artist Francis Bacon. Hopelessly at odds with Bacon's cynical, sophisticated milieu and bewildered by the painter's cruelty toward him, Dyer sought refuge in drugs and alcohol. British fact-based drama, starring Derek Jacobi, Daniel Craig, Tilda Swinton and Adrian Scarborough

programme.title: Freehold (2017)
programme.desc: Fast-talking estate agent Hussein finds his personal and professional life unravelling as a wronged former client takes his revenge. Comedy horror, starring Javier Botet, Mandeep Dhillon and Mim Shaikh

programme.title: Churchill's First World War
programme.desc: Drama-documentary charting Winston Churchill's road to redemption after his disgrace following the Dardanelles disaster during the First World War through intimate letters he wrote to his wife Clementine. It reveals how he was instrumental in the creation of the tank and notes his contribution to the Allied victory in 1918 as Minister of Munitions, demonstrating how the future prime minister was shaped by his experiences of the Great War

programme.title: A Jubilee Tribute to the Queen by the Prince of Wales
programme.desc: Prince Charles pays a personal tribute to Her Majesty to mark her 60-year reign. He reflects on various public events and private family moments over the past six decades and shows previously unseen photographs and home movies - some of which were shot by the Queen herself

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Heidi

programme.title: Nils Holgersson

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Re-joining the flock, Nils and Martin are caught by a group of crows who have come to join the Black Elf

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Smirre repeatedly attacks the geese, who only just manage to escape

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls perform at a billionaire's birthday party, but end up breaking off the concert to find his missing cat

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A PR coach convinces the girls they will be more popular if they adopt a goth image - but their gloomy new look has the opposite effect

programme.title: K3

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls try to find a movie star's lost Chihuahuas while a storm is brewing

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The documentary reveals the inner workings of Britain's busiest station, Oxford Circus, as passenger numbers become so great that the staff are forced to close its doors. Plus, police set out to arrest a homeless man who has his own 'place' on the thoroughfare and pop star Nicole Scherzinger shops at HMV

programme.title: A Jubilee Tribute to the Queen by the Prince of Wales
programme.desc: Prince Charles pays a personal tribute to Her Majesty to mark her 60-year reign. He reflects on various public events and private family moments over the past six decades and shows previously unseen photographs and home movies - some of which were shot by the Queen herself

programme.title: Churchill's First World War
programme.desc: Drama-documentary charting Winston Churchill's road to redemption after his disgrace following the Dardanelles disaster during the First World War through intimate letters he wrote to his wife Clementine. It reveals how he was instrumental in the creation of the tank and notes his contribution to the Allied victory in 1918 as Minister of Munitions, demonstrating how the future prime minister was shaped by his experiences of the Great War

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)
programme.desc: An ex-convict plans one last daring heist, by tunneling into a bank vault through the basement of a neighbouring house. Crime drama, starring William Lucas and John Rutland

programme.title: Macbeth (1997)
programme.desc: A general in medieval Scotland is told by three witches that he is destined to become king, so plots to murder the current monarch and seize the throne. However, once he has taken the crown he is consumed by paranoia, and goes to terrible lengths to ensure his reign continues. Shakespeare's tragedy, starring Jason Connery and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash gets some time off and plans to spend it in bed - but Susan has other ideas

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The documentary reveals the inner workings of Britain's busiest station, Oxford Circus, as passenger numbers become so great that the staff are forced to close its doors. Plus, police set out to arrest a homeless man who has his own 'place' on the thoroughfare and pop star Nicole Scherzinger shops at HMV

programme.title: May to December
programme.desc: Gentle comedy, starring Anton Rodgers

programme.title: Paper!
programme.desc: A piece of London history. Shot in the 1960's on 8mm film featuring the many news vendors around London selling the three evening newspapers

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the contrasting stories of people responding to the traumas of the Second World War. While Kent student Daphne Baker set her heart on becoming a head teacher as her contribution to the war effort, conman Neville Heath embarked on a fraudulent spree preying on vulnerable women

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. Originally hopeless horseman Glenn is apprehensive - as is Adrian Van Loon, whose kit often fails to meet the rigorous standards. Gunners from the armoured regiment practise on the firing range with live ammunition, and the Household Cavalry's historian talks about their role in the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: 16th-century Europe was a hotbed of tense international intrigue. Mary Stuart and Elizabeth I confront one another on matters religious, political and personal

programme.title: White Collar Boxing
programme.desc: Fast-paced adrenaline-filled White Collar Boxing from The WBCL. Fighting talk, getting up close and personal to the competitors in and out of the ring

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Presenter Bernard O'Mahoney meets Billy Robinson, who once recruited Newcastle's top villains to work as doormen around the city - including Viv Graham, who was killed in 1993

programme.title: Nothing But the Truth (2008)
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers an international political scandal, but breaking the story entails revealing the identity of an undercover CIA agent. She refuses to reveal her source to the government, and is imprisoned. While she takes her legal battle to the supreme court, the exposed spy finds her career on the line and her life in danger. Thriller, starring Kate Beckinsale and Vera Farmiga

programme.title: 3 Steps to Heaven (1995)
programme.desc: A man's body is found in the Thames, and his girlfriend is convinced he was murdered. Adopting a series of disguises, she sets out to find the last three men to see him alive, and discover the truth about what happened - but is unprepared for the secrets she uncovers about the man she thought she knew. Drama, starring Katrin Cartlidge, Frances Barber and James Fleet

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash employs some new technology that does not work. A new recruit gets some training, and a magazine article causes tension amid the team's superior officers

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The documentary reveals the inner workings of Britain's busiest station, Oxford Circus, as passenger numbers become so great that the staff are forced to close its doors. programme.title: Hell Is a City (1960)
programme.desc: A tough criminal escapes from jail and hatches a scheme to rob a wealthy bookie, little realising a hardened copper is hot on his trail. Thriller, starring Stanley Baker, John Crawford, Donald Pleasence and Billie Whitelaw

programme.title: Crimes at the Dark House ()
programme.desc: A criminal murders an aristocrat, planning to assume his identity - but is disappointed to discover the man he has replaced is heavily in debt. He then plots to marry a wealthy heiress for her fortune, but is forced to kill anyone who comes close to learning his true identity. Horror based on Wilkie Collins' The Woman in White, starring Tod Slaughter and Sylvia Marriott

programme.title: A London Community in Lockdown
programme.desc: A heartfelt look at life during lockdown in the Listraban community in London, a record of a moment in time that will be in the history books for generations to come

programme.title: Jamal
programme.desc: A Rastafarian explains his philosophy whilst growing and cultivating an orchard on a small Caribbean island

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: The team deals with a bomb at a gas works, only to discover another explosive device - which is set to go off at a specific time

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Plainclothes police on patrol run into an argument outside a shop, but when they try and find out what is going on, there is a surprise none of them expected

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old man receives a shock when consultant surgeon Shaw Somers reveals he is suffering from metabolic syndrome and his body is more like that of a 60-year-old. A 23-year-old woman seeks help with her extremely bad breath, GP Giovanni Miletto puts together an experimental plan to combat chronic fatigue syndrome, and Pixie McKenna discovers how diet can influence people's chances of developing cancer

programme.title: Great British Mortgage Swindle
programme.desc: Documentary about institutionalised mortgage fraud and and the brutality of eviction by court order

programme.title: The Weekend (2016)
programme.desc: Three friends stumble across £100,000, and spend it all on a shopping spree and a wild party. However, thwey then discover that the money belongs to a feared gangster - and he expects them to pay back every penny. Comedy, starring Joivan Wade, Percelle Ascott and Dee Kaate

programme.title: Queen of the Blues (1979)
programme.desc: Two brothers buy a failing Soho nightclub and hope to turn its fortunes around - but they end up being threatened by gangsters demanding protection money. Fortunately, salvation is at hand in an enthusiastic stripper, who comes up with a plan to save the day. Drama, starring Mary Millington and Rosemary England

programme.title: Essex Vendetta (2016)
programme.desc: An ordinary man is drawn into the dangerous world of organised crime as he strives to protect his family. His new life in the Essex underworld leads to him being sent on a murderous mission to Malta, where he discovers his partners in crime are not to be trusted. Crime drama, starring Michael McKell, Kris Johnson and Danniella Westbrook

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Phillip Schofield invites Olympic gymnast and 2012 Strictly Come Dancing champion Louis Smith and former TOWIE star Mark Wright to take part in a charity edition of the nerve-racking game show. Both are challenged to complete up to seven seemingly simple tasks within the confines of a large transparent cube to win a jackpot of £250,000. But each celebrity has only nine lives - and every time they lose one, the pressure mounts

The Red Devils were favourites to end their long title drought as Liverpool faltered with an ageing side, but Howard Wilkinson's men refused to give up the chase

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty
